summary: Ionizing radiation damages DNA through hydroxyl radical reactions, initiating apoptotic pathways; this aligns well with options involving molecular-level mechanisms like C – Ionization as a primary cause for cell death due to radiation exposure. The cascade effect leads ultimately towards cell dysfunction followed by demise regardless if other factors are considered negligible here given strong supporting data focused directly at genetic material alteration post-irradiation event. To reiterate succinctly but comprehensively without extraneous detail while staying true to core principles discussed earlier regarding causality between irradiated tissue & resultant biological outcomes driven fundamentally down path initiated initially upon atomic/molecular level interaction described above.
